Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Depositions Of Defts' Persons Most Qualified; Request For Order Of Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Jul-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Franklin Dean Thomas, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party:Bank of America;
No other appearances.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED:
Plaintiff Bank of Amercia's Motion For Order Compelling Depositions Of Persons Most Qualified; Request For Monetary Sanctions.
-Motion To For Order Compelling Depositions Of Persons Most Qualified GRANTED;
-Within five days of this order, defendants shall cooperate with plaintiff to agree to a date or dates for the requested depositions;
-Request For Monetary Sanctions DENIED.
ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. Not Reported
